summary: Financial SaaS module testing complete. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified admin finanzas overview with enriched table (Unidad, Residente, Estado, Deuda, Accion), payment settings dialog, payment requests panel. Resident finanzas dashboard shows unit, status, balance, breakdown, history, and 'Pagar ahora' flow with SINPE/Transfer instructions.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed
Console warning: GPS Error GeolocationPositionError - expected on test environment
Console warning: Could not fetch condominium modules - 403 error, defaulting to all enabled

critical_code_review_comments: Payment settings endpoint correctly stores SINPE/bank info in condominium document
Overview endpoint properly joins unit_accounts with users collection to show resident names/emails
Login response now includes 'apartment' field from user.apartment or user.role_data.apartment_number
Payment request flow: resident creates request → admin sees in panel → approve/reject → payment registered if approved
All data-testid attributes present for testing
seed_data_creation: Payment requests created during testing for approval/rejection flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Financial SaaS module fully tested. Admin can configure SINPE/bank info via 'Datos de Pago' button. Resident can view balance, breakdown, history and submit payment requests via 'Pagar ahora' button. Admin sees pending payment requests panel and can approve/reject. All endpoints working: GET/PUT payment-settings, POST assign-unit, POST payment-request, GET payment-requests, PATCH payment-requests/{id}?action=approved/rejected.

admin_finanzas.summary_cards: Total Cobrado, Total Pagado, Balance Global, Al dia, Atrasados
admin_finanzas.enhanced_table: Unidad | Residente (name+email) | Estado | Deuda | Accion (Pago button)
admin_finanzas.payment_settings_dialog: SINPE number, SINPE name, Bank name, Bank account, Bank IBAN, Additional instructions
admin_finanzas.payment_requests_panel: Shows pending requests with approve/reject buttons
admin_finanzas.action_buttons: Tipo de Cargo, Generar Cargo, Cargos Masivos, Registrar Pago, Datos de Pago, PDF, CSV

resident_finanzas.balance_card: Unit name, Status badge, Balance amount, 'Pagar ahora' button
resident_finanzas.pending_requests: Shows submitted payment requests with 'En revision' status
resident_finanzas.breakdown: Shows charges by type with pending amounts

pay_dialog.sinpe_instructions: Shows configured SINPE number with copy button, name, additional instructions
pay_dialog.transfer_instructions: Shows configured bank info with copy buttons

backend_apis: GET /api/finanzas/overview - returns enriched accounts with resident info
POST /api/finanzas/payment-request - creates payment request from resident
